html:
Exclusive to:

Nectar is a Food Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC, dropped by any levels of Snaptooth Seedlings and Snaptooth Flytraps.

It cannot be cooked or used in the Crock Pot, however it can be placed in a Honey Chest to produce Honey after 1/10 day (48 seconds).

By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

“I could use this to make honey.”
–Wilson
“Is this even good for anything?”
–Willow
“Is sweet like honey.”
–Wolfgang
“Is it even worth turning this to honey?”
–Wendy
“REQUIRES HONEY CONVERTER TO BECOME USEFUL”
–WX-78
“I wonder if this could somehow be turned to honey.”
–Wickerbottom
“Nectar makes honey, eh.”
–Woodie
“Needs a suitable container to be turned into honey.”
–Maxwell
“Requires an enzymatic processor to convert it to honey.”
–Wagstaff
“Fööd för insects, nöt wörthy öf a shieldmaiden.”
–Wigfrid
“Spiders don't like this, but other bugs do!”
–Webber
“I wonder if I can make honey out of this.”
–Walani
“The ingredients for honey making.”
–Warly
“Tha sweet, sweet nectar!”
–Woodlegs
“HOWFORE WILBA TURN IT TO THE SWEET YUMS?”
–Wilba
“Sweet!”
–Wormwood
“Now to find something that'll make this into something good.”
–Wheeler
Nectar is a Food Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC, dropped by any levels of Snaptooth Seedlings and Snaptooth Flytraps.
It cannot be cooked or used in the Crock Pot, however it can be placed in a Honey Chest to produce Honey after 1/10 day (48 seconds).

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mật Hoa là một Vật Phẩm Thực Phẩm độc quyền cho Hamlet DLC, rơi ra từ Cây Giống Snaptooth và Bẫy Ruồi Snaptooth ở bất kỳ cấp độ nào.

'''Nectar''' is a [[Food]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, dropped by any levels of [[Snaptooth Seedling]]s and [[Snaptooth Flytrap]]s.

It cannot be cooked or used in the [[Crock Pot]], however it can be placed in a [[Honey Chest]] to produce [[Honey]] after 1/10 day (48 seconds).
